GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [cntrycode@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cntrycode], aggr=[count(*), sum(custsale.c_acctbal)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([cntrycode@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[cntrycode], aggr=[count(*), sum(custsale.c_acctbal)]
              GpuProjectExec
                NestedLoopJoinExec: join_type=Inner, filter=CAST(c_acctbal@0 AS Decimal128(19, 6)) > avg(customer.c_acctbal)@1, projection=[c_phone@1, c_acctbal@2]
                  GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[avg(customer.c_acctbal)]
                    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec
                      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[], aggr=[avg(customer.c_acctbal)]
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                          GpuFilterExec
                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                    GpuHashJoinExec
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([c_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                            GpuFilterExec
                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=19173961
                        GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_custkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                          GpuScanExec: batch_size=19173961
--- memory ---
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
  GpuSortExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                NestedLoopJoinExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                  GpuAggregateExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
                    GpuCoalescePartitionsExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
                      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
                          GpuFilterExec: row_width=16, subtree_max_row_bytes=64
                            GpuScanExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=48
                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                    GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                            GpuFilterExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=112
                              GpuScanExec: row_width=56, subtree_max_row_bytes=56
                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8
                        GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8
                          GpuScanExec: row_width=8, subtree_max_row_bytes=8
